basics.name: Lianghui Yi
basics.label: Forward Deployed Engineer — Systems
basics.summary: Forward Deployed Engineer with 7+ years architecting and shipping production cloud infrastructure — designed multi-tenant AWS environments (EC2, Aurora Serverless, IAM, SCPs) supporting high-scale AI workloads and scaled a technical product to $1M ARR. Specialized in cloud architecture, containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), and end-to-end infrastructure deployment for AI companies.

work.name: 24 Helpful, LLC
highlights: Architected multi-tenant AWS infrastructure (EC2, Aurora Serverless, SES, IAM, SCPs) with automated tenant isolation, supporting concurrent deployments of experimental AI products without per-product infrastructure rework.
Deployed production multi-tenant compute on EC2 with per-user IAM roles and automated provisioning, enabling secure, isolated workloads across 100+ beta users.

Implemented OAuth 2.0 authorization and Streamable HTTP transport for MCP servers deployed on AWS, resolving multi-week networking and integration edge cases across Claude and ChatGPT client implementations.
Designed a self-evolving code loop (generator/evaluator) with GitHub Actions CI/CD, closing deployment iteration cycles in under 24 hours across multiple AI products.
Codified deployment playbooks, runbooks, and infrastructure conventions that standardized rollout and migration of experimental AI products to production.

work.name: 24Haowan Network Technology Co., Ltd.
highlights: Led infrastructure for a product scaled to $1,000,000 ARR — operated PHP/Node.js/Python backend and Vue frontend on Kubernetes and Docker over Aliyun cloud.
Built internal tooling that improved team delivery cadence across a cross-functional engineering team of 10 over a 6-month period.
Engaged enterprise customers directly to scope technical requirements and convert 3 strategic accounts within 3 months.

work.name: Maiduote Network Technology Co., Ltd.
highlights: Led end-to-end platform development and production launch, acquiring 50,000+ users in 6 months with a stable, cross-functional engineering rollout.

projects.name: tokenman.io
projects.description: Multi-tenant Claude Code terminal hosting SaaS + auto-evolving agentic workflow scaffold
highlights: Built terminal.tokenman.io, a multi-tenant Claude Code CLI hosting SaaS on EC2 with mobile-first SSH, persistent tmux sessions, and cloud-init provisioning for secure, disposable production compute access.
Built a skill-based repo self-evolution scaffold with shared AI context and slash commands, enabling autonomous AI-driven code loops via GitHub Actions.

projects.name: aInbox (ainbox.io)
projects.description: MCP-Native AI Agent Email Middleware on AWS
highlights: Shipped multi-tenant AWS infrastructure (EC2, Aurora Serverless, SES, per-user IAM) for MCP-native AI agent middleware serving 100+ beta users.
Implemented Streamable HTTP transport and OAuth 2.0 for production MCP server, resolving networking edge cases across multiple LLM client implementations.

projects.name: AgentFolio
highlights: Built AgentFolio, an open-source agentic portfolio engine (MIT-licensed, GitHub template) with a GitHub Actions pipeline auto-generating JSON Resume + PDFs on data changes; zero third-party infrastructure cost.

skills.name: Cloud & Infrastructure
keywords: AWS (EC2, SES, Aurora Serverless, IAM, SCPs)

education.institution: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications

volunteer.summary: Led community initiatives and organized weekly founder-focused events (1,000+ participants in one year).
Submitted a bug-fix pull request to Anthropic's public Claude Agent SDK demos repository for an issue discovered while integrating the released SDK.
